title: S6: Composition Graph Infrastructure + Capability Resolution
intent: Add module dependency fields to ModuleManifest, implement DAG construction, cycle detection, topological sort, and composition-aware capability resolution. The system currently operates on flat module union only — this sprint introduces the graph infrastructure required for real multi-module composition. Forces DAG traversal, capability resolution through dependency chains, and deterministic snapshot ordering of composition topology.
acceptance_criteria: [MIGRATION] Define acceptance criteria for this packet
